ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the observation */,
  "mean_gradient_total" REAL /* Mean gradient total */,
  "mean_gradient_horizontal" REAL /* Mean gradient horizontal */,
  "mean_gradient_vertical" REAL /* Mean gradient vertical */,
  "twist_alpha" REAL /* Twist (alpha) */,
  "mean_inclination_angle" REAL /* Mean inclination angle from radial */,
  "mean_photospheric_magnetic_free_energy" REAL /* Mean photospheric magnetic free energy */,
  "mean_shear_angle" REAL /* Mean shear angle */,
  "fraction_area_shear_gt_45_deg" REAL /* Fraction area shear greater than 45 degrees */,
  "mean_vertical_current_density" REAL /* Mean vertical current density */,
  "unsigned_magnetic_flux" REAL /* Unsigned magnetic flux in Gauss/Cm^2 */,
  "total_unsigned_current" REAL /* Total unsigned current in Ampere */,
  "total_photospheric_energy_density" REAL /* Total photospheric energy density */,
  "total_unsigned_current_helicity" REAL /* Total unsigned current helicity */,
  "absolute_val_of_current_helicity" REAL /* Absolute value of current helicity */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used */,
  "observatory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observatory */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the observation location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the observation location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the observation location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observatory_id FOREIGN KEY ("observatory_id") REFERENCES observatories ("observatory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observatories" (
  "observatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observatory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the observatory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the observatory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the observatory */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the observatory */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the observatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observatory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation used to make the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the prediction */,
  "predicted_flare" INTEGER /* Whether a flare is predicted */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the flare occurring */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_module" TEXT /* Module accessed (e.g., observations, predictions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., flare predicted, flare detected) */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date and time of subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used for training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date and time of training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being evaluated */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., completeness, accuracy) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
